reference_answer: A member may reserve the laser cutter only after completing two supervised practice sessions.
A weekend reservation request for the laser cutter activates the rule.
An instructor endorsement exception waives the two-session practice requirement for the member's next weekend reservation only.
The safety hold rule overrides ordinary reservation approval when the cutter's exhaust alarm is active.
The safety hold rule takes precedence.
Use the paper sign-up sheet at the front desk.
